headline: United Airlines makes big change to its bags policy
summary: Flying is becoming more expensive day by day, and this time, travelers are feeling the impact right at check-in. Rising fuel costs are forcing airlines to make tough decisions, and United Airlines (UAL) is the latest to act. The 95-year-old Chicago-based carrier has increased its checked bag fees, ...
